known_issues: ZIP download link not appearing / ZIP not generated; user requested regenerating the ZIP.

existing_features.title: Generate a new downloadable ZIP archive containing the exact current deployed Empire C.C codebase (frontend + backend + all project configuration files required to build and deploy the same app), and present a fresh download link/button to the user in the chat.

Include a README (in English) inside the generated ZIP that documents: how to install dependencies, how to run the app locally, how to deploy the canister(s), and where/how to configure provider keys using the app’s existing key vault flow.
